public_reputation: Known around Banner Anchorage through day-to-day work as commerce broker.
manner: Evaluates every conversation for margin, dependency, and what can be made to move next. In Banner Anchorage, that habit reads through the public pressures of the place rather than decorative flourish.
daily_function: Performs the ongoing duties of commerce broker in and around Banner Anchorage, where the role has practical consequences even when nothing dramatic is happening.
current_agenda: Keep Banner Anchorage workable through the obligations of commerce broker while managing the immediate pressure of berth competition, escort favoritism.
hidden_pressure: Must keep the role of commerce broker credible while absorbing the strain created by berth competition, escort favoritism.

support_scope_notes: Created in V33_1 to ensure every locality-facing NPC access role resolves to a proper named person while remaining sparse and canon-safe.
public_signal: In public, Cyran Sealwater is immediately readable as a commerce broker tied to Banner Anchorage.

encounter_context.usual_environment: Banner Anchorage: ordinary workspaces, public counters, roads, docks, shrines, workshops, or other role-relevant spaces

first_impression: Cyran Sealwater presents as someone shaped by the duties of a commerce broker and the daily pressures of Banner Anchorage.
what_they_want_from_strangers: Useful clarity, respect for the work of a commerce broker, and proof that strangers will not make Banner Anchorage harder to manage.
what_they_refuse: Cyran Sealwater refuses careless disrespect, vague promises, and demands that threaten standing or workload.
how_they_create_problems: By enforcing the expectations of a commerce broker too rigidly, protecting local reputation, or turning a small request into a larger obligation.
how_they_can_help: Can redirect supply, access networks, and read market pressure clearly.
escalation_if_crossed: If crossed, Cyran Sealwater adds scrutiny, delay, and locality-specific friction before direct punishment.
rumor_about_them: People say Cyran Sealwater always knows more about Banner Anchorage than is immediately visible.
best_first_scene: A first encounter works best when the party needs guidance, access, or relief tied to a commerce broker in Banner Anchorage.
